One platform.
Endless ways to work together.
Collaboration
Customer support
Marketing

Employee engagement
Support hybrid and remote work:
Keep global teams engaged with reliable video, chat, documents, and more.
Seamless communication:
Save time and cut costs with Meetings, Phone, Chat, and more, in one UCaaS platform.
Keep workflows moving:
From brainstorms to documents, Zoom helps teams cut friction and avoid stalls.
Do more with AI:
Built-in AI summarizes meetings, drafts follow-ups, and automates next steps.
Explore products
Explore products
Your browser does not support the video tag.
One platform, full context:
Phone, chat, email, SMS, social, and video unified in a single view.
Smarter automation:
Virtual Agent handles multi-intent questions, so human agents can focus on high-value cases.
Better self-service:
Instant answers and proactive resolutions cut friction and drive loyalty.
AI-powered support:
Real-time suggestions, key action highlights, and task automation keep agents sharp.
Get more from your data:
CRM integration, real-time analytics, and conversation insights surface trends and improve CX.
Explore products
Explore products
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Keep audiences engaged:
Capture leads with branded webinars and events that build pipeline.
Deliver stand-out experiences:

Broader reach and richer insights:
Extend every event with virtual and hybrid options.
Put busywork on auto-pilot with AI:
Automate content, personalize outreach, and analyze performance faster.
Explore products

Make selling easier:
Eliminate admin work so reps can focus on building relationships.
Boost productivity and win rates:
Auto-summarized meetings, suggested follow-ups, and deal insights keep cycles short.
Give RevOps deeper visibility:
See pipeline insights and competitor trends for confident forecasting.
Close with confidence:
Agentic AI flags risks, coaches reps, and automates next steps.

Create immersive experiences:

Communicate on your schedule:
Share video updates asynchronously — no extra meetings.
Reinforce culture and recognition:
Celebrate wins, milestones, and initiatives with rich media and live events.
Measure engagement to improve:
Track participation with analytics from Events, Clips, and Workvivo.

"Before Zoom, we juggled 10-plus tabs to handle calls. Now, everything is integrated into one clean platform, from CRM connections to video transitions. It is a dream workflow."

Acceptable Use Guidelines
Legal & Compliance
Your Privacy Choices
Cookies Settings
Site Map
Site Map
Zoom uses cookies and similar technologies as described in our
cookie statement
. You can manage your cookie settings or exercise your rights related to cookies through our Cookies Settings.
Cookies Settings
Cookie Preference Center
Cookies and other similar technologies (“Cookies”) are important to the proper functioning of a site and to provide visitors with a seamless and customized experience.  Zoom uses Cookies to enable you to use our site. We also use cookies to enable you to personalize your use of our site, to provide you enhanced functionality and to continuously improve the performance of our site. If you have Targeting cookies enabled below and depending on your account type or login state, we may allow third-party advertisers to show you advertising relevant to you on our website or products, using their Cookies on our site.
You can accept or decline all but Strictly Necessary Cookies, or customize your cookie settings below. You can change your cookie settings at any time. Some Strictly Necessary Cookies may transfer personal data to the United States.  To learn more about how Zoom processes personal data, please visit our
privacy statement
.
For California Residents, you may exercise your right to “Opt-Out of the Sale of Personal Information” by toggling the button labeled “Targeting” below to off.
More information
Accept All Cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to track your usage of our website and, depending on their policies, may combine that information with other information to show you relevant advertisements on our site and other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will not see personalized advertising on Zoom’s website or products.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and customization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work.
Cookies Details‎

Participant capacity
Participants can join your meeting for free from their phone, desktop, mobile and tablet devices. A participant does not need a Zoom account in order to join a meeting. Each plan has a participant limit, but users can increase this limit on paid plans by purchasing an add-on.

Security and Compliance
End-to-end encryption for Zoom Meetings
When enabled, Zoom’s end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for Zoom Meetings means that communications between all meeting participants using Zoom clients in a given meeting are encrypted using cryptographic keys known only to the devices of those participants. This means that no third party — including Zoom — has access to the meeting’s private keys.
Enterprise-grade security features
256-bit AES-GCM encryption for real-time content and media, TLS encryption during SIP registration, caller ID masking, private network peering, tool fraud detection, and calling block lists.
Encryption by Default
GDPR control
Single sign-on via SAML 2.0
Supports Microsoft Active Directory, Google, Ping, Okta, Centrify. Requires Business, Education, or Enterprise account.

Frequently asked questions
What is a Licensed user and what is a Participant?
A licensed user has either a free or paid meeting license and can schedule meetings with participants based on the capacity their plan allows. A Participant is an invitee in a meeting scheduled by someone with a meeting license. A Participant does not require a Zoom account nor license in order to join a meeting and can join for free. Participants can join a meeting from their phone, desktop, mobile and tablet devices.
How many participants can join the meeting?
All plans allow up to 100 participants by default in each meeting (up to 1,000 with Large Meeting add-on).
How many people can use one Zoom Meetings license?
A licensed user can host an unlimited number of meetings. However if multiple users have the need to sched

Cookie Preference Center
Cookies and other similar technologies (“Cookies”) are important to the proper functioning of a site and to provide visitors with a seamless and customized experience.  Zoom uses Cookies to enable you to use our site. We also use cookies to enable you to personalize your use of our site, to provide you enhanced functionality and to continuously improve the performance of our site. If you have Targeting cookies enabled below and depending on your account type or login state, we may allow third-party advertisers to show you advertising relevant to you on our website or products, using their Cookies on our site.
You can accept or decline all but Strictly Necessary Cookies, or customize your cookie settings below. You can change your cookie settings at any time. Some Strictly Necessary Cookies may transfer personal data to the United States.  To learn more about how Zoom processes personal data, please visit our
privacy statement
.
For California Residents, you may exercise your right to “Opt-Out of the Sale of Personal Information” by toggling the button labeled “Targeting” below to off.
More information
Accept All Cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to track your usage of our website and, depending on their policies, may combine that information with other information to show you relevant advertisements on our site and other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will not see personalized advertising on Zoom’s website or products.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and customization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work.
Cookies Details‎

Cookie Preference Center
Cookies and other similar technologies (“Cookies”) are important to the proper functioning of a site and to provide visitors with a seamless and customized experience.  Zoom uses Cookies to enable you to use our site. We also use cookies to enable you to personalize your use of our site, to provide you enhanced functionality and to continuously improve the performance of our site. If you have Targeting cookies enabled below and depending on your account type or login state, we may allow third-party advertisers to show you advertising relevant to you on our website or products, using their Cookies on our site.
You can accept or decline all but Strictly Necessary Cookies, or customize your cookie settings below. You can change your cookie settings at any time. Some Strictly Necessary Cookies may transfer personal data to the United States.  To learn more about how Zoom processes personal data, please visit our
privacy statement
.
For California Residents, you may exercise your right to “Opt-Out of the Sale of Personal Information” by toggling the button labeled “Targeting” below to off.

Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to track your usage of our website and, depending on their policies, may combine that information with other information to show you relevant advertisements on our site and other sites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will not see personalized advertising on Zoom’s website or products.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and customization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usual

analysis.name: Zoom
analysis.value_proposition: AI-first unified communications platform combining meetings, phone, chat, and customer experience tools in a single workspace.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-to-large enterprises needing unified UCaaS and CCaaS with embedded AI across collaboration and customer-facing workflows

features.name: video meetings
features.description: HD video conferencing with screen share, reactions, and participant controls across devices
features.evidence_quote: Simplified video conferencing and messaging across any device

features.name: team chat
features.description: Persistent instant messaging with channels, threads, and file sharing

features.name: voip phone
features.description: Cloud phone system with VoIP calling; full PBX available on Enterprise

features.name: zoom mail
features.description: Native Zoom email client; Basic connects Gmail/Outlook, Pro+ gets full Zoom Mail
features.evidence_quote: Mail: Connect Gmail/Outlook in Zoom... Zoom Mail

features.name: zoom calendar
features.description: Native calendar app; Basic syncs Google/Microsoft, Pro+ gets full Zoom Calendar
features.evidence_quote: Calendar: Sync Google/Microsoft calendars... Zoom Calendar

features.name: scheduler
features.description: Booking pages for external scheduling; 1 page on Basic, unlimited on Business+
features.evidence_quote: Scheduler: 1 personal booking page... Unlimited booking pages

features.name: whiteboard
features.description: Digital collaborative whiteboard; 3 editable on Basic, unlimited on Business+

features.name: clips
features.description: Async short-form video messaging; 5 two-minute clips on Basic, unlimited on Pro+

features.name: custom avatars
features.description: AI-generated animated video avatar for clips (3 min/month on Pro)

features.name: canvas
features.description: AI-powered document and content creation workspace; unlimited on Pro+

features.name: ai companion
features.description: Built-in AI assistant for in-meeting suggestions, summaries, and task automation

features.name: my notes
features.description: AI note taker that captures, summarizes, and extracts action items; limited on Basic, unlimited on Pro+

features.name: cross-platform ai note-taking
features.description: AI notes work across Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, and in-person meetings
features.evidence_quote: AI note-taking across Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, in-person meetings, and 3rd-party meetings

features.name: speaker identification
features.description: AI identifies individual speakers in meeting transcripts and notes

features.name: ai meeting summary
features.description: Auto-generated post-meeting summaries, follow-up drafts, and next-step suggestions
features.evidence_quote: Built-in AI summarizes meetings, drafts follow-ups, and automates next steps

features.name: custom ai companion
features.description: Customizable AI companion with tailored behaviors, personas, and knowledge bases

features.name: ai services
features.description: Developer API access to Zoom's underlying AI models and capabilities

features.name: slides
features.description: AI-powered presentation creation tool

features.name: sheets
features.description: AI-powered spreadsheet tool within the Zoom platform

features.name: hub
features.description: Centralized workspace for accessing all Zoom files, recordings, and clips
features.evidence_quote: Hub: One place for your Zoom files

features.name: tasks
features.description: Task management surface integrated across Zoom products
features.evidence_quote: Tasks: Surface, manage, and complete tasks

features.name: video management
features.description: Organize and share videos in channels with viewer tracking (25 unique viewers/channel on Pro)
features.evidence_quote: Video Management: Group videos in channels (25 unique viewers)

features.name: cloud recording
features.description: Store recordings in Zoom Cloud; 10GB/license on Pro/Business, unlimited on Enterprise
features.evidence_quote: Local & 10 GB cloud (per license)... Local & Unlimited cloud

features.name: local recording
features.description: Save meeting recordings locally in MP4 (video), M4A (audio), and txt (chat) formats
features.evidence_quote: Zoom local recording saves your meeting recordings in MP4 (video), M4A (audio) and txt (chat) formats

features.name: automated captions
features.description: Real-time automatic closed captioning during meetings

features.name: translated captions
features.description: Real-time caption translation into other languages during meetings

features.name: breakout rooms
features.description: Split a meeting into smaller sub-group sessions with host controls

features.name: large meeting add-on
features.description: Purchasable add-on to increase participant capacity beyond plan limit

features.name: live chat support
features.description: Real-time live chat support channel for Pro plan and above

features.name: sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise identity management

features.name: managed domains
features.description: Centrally provision and manage user accounts across corporate email domains

features.name: device management
features.description: Enforce security and configuration policies on user devices

features.name: information barriers
features.description: Compliance policies that restrict communication between defined user groups

features.name: archival and dlp apis
features.description: APIs for e-discovery archival and data loss prevention compliance workflows
features.evidence_quote: Archival and data loss prevention APIs

features.name: multi-region storage
features.description: Store meeting data in specific geographic regions for data residency compliance

features.name: customer managed key
features.description: Bring-your-own encryption key for full control over data encryption

features.name: hybrid cloud
features.description: Deploy Zoom infrastructure in a hybrid on-premises/cloud configuration

features.name: contact management network
features.description: Enterprise-scale federated contact directory and cross-org contact management

features.name: zoom rooms
features.description: Conference room hardware/software system for in-office meeting spaces

features.name: workspace reservation
features.description: Hot-desk and conference room booking system for hybrid workplaces

features.name: visitor management
features.description: Track, register, and manage office visitors

features.name: digital signage
features.description: Manage and broadcast content to digital displays across office locations

features.name: workvivo
features.description: Employee engagement platform with social feeds, recognition, and all-hands broadcasts
features.evidence_quote: Get company-wide updates, recognition, and social feeds that connect remote employees

features.name: contact center
features.description: Omnichannel CCaaS with phone, chat, email, SMS, social, and video in one view
features.evidence_quote: Phone, chat, email, SMS, social, and video unified in a single view

features.name: virtual agent
features.description: AI-powered customer self-service chatbot with multi-intent question handling
features.evidence_quote: Virtual Agent handles multi-intent questions, so human agents can focus on high-value cases

features.name: cx insights
features.description: Real-time analytics and conversation insights for contact center performance
features.evidence_quote: CRM integration, real-time analytics, and conversation insights surface trends and improve CX

features.name: workforce engagement management
features.description: WFM, quality management, and agent performance tools for contact centers

features.name: revenue accelerator
features.description: Sales conversation intelligence with AI coaching, deal insights, and pipeline analytics
features.evidence_quote: Auto-summarized meetings, suggested follow-ups, and deal insights keep cycles short

features.name: webinars
features.description: Branded webinar hosting with lead capture, Q&A, polls, and attendee analytics

features.name: events
features.description: Virtual and hybrid event hosting with interactive features and branded experiences
features.evidence_quote: Host polished, interactive events that reflect your brand

features.name: bonsai
features.description: Business services product (exact scope unclear from available sources)

features.name: brighthire
features.description: Interview intelligence and structured hiring workflow tool

features.name: video sdk
features.description: SDK to embed custom video experiences into third-party web and mobile applications

features.name: meeting sdk
features.description: SDK to embed full Zoom meeting functionality into third-party applications

features.name: cobrowse sdk
features.description: SDK enabling real-time co-browsing for customer support and guided sessions

features.name: rest apis
features.description: Programmatic REST API access to Zoom account data and functionality

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhook notifications for Zoom account and meeting lifecycle events

features.name: mcp integration
features.description: Model Context Protocol support enabling AI agent access to Zoom data and actions

features.name: realtime media streams
features.description: Real-time audio and video stream access for third-party processing and analysis

features.name: zoom apps
features.description: In-meeting third-party apps that run within the Zoom meeting interface

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Marketplace of 3,400+ third-party apps and integrations for Zoom products
features.evidence_quote: Explore 3,446 apps in Zoom App Marketplace

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: No-code automation builder for connecting Zoom events to actions and agents

features.name: virtual backgrounds
features.description: Custom image and animated virtual backgrounds for video meetings

features.name: vdi support
features.description: Optimized Zoom client for Virtual Desktop Infrastructure environments

features.name: competitor trend analytics
features.description: RevOps visibility into competitor trends mentioned in sales calls for forecasting
features.evidence_quote: See pipeline insights and competitor trends for confident forecasting

features.name: agentic ai coaching
features.description: AI flags deal risks, coaches sales reps, and automates next steps in real time
features.evidence_quote: Agentic AI flags risks, coaches reps, and automates next steps

differentiators: AI Companion built into every product tier — not a separate add-on cost
My Notes AI note taker works across Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, AND in-person meetings
Single platform spanning full UCaaS (meetings, phone, chat, mail) and CCaaS (contact center, virtual agent, WEM)
Custom AI Companion allowing enterprises to build tailored AI experiences on top of Zoom
Model Context Protocol (MCP) support for AI agent integration
Customer-managed encryption key option for regulated industry compliance

recent_ships.what: My Notes — AI note taker across Zoom, Teams, Meet, and in-person meetings with action item extraction
recent_ships.source: NEW badge on landing and pricing: 'My Notes, your AI note taker — Automatically captures, summarizes, and extracts action items'

free_tier.limits: 40-min meeting cap, 100 participants, 3 whiteboards, 5 clips (2-min each), 1 booking page, limited AI

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 40-min meetings (100 participants), chat, VoIP, 3 whiteboards, 5 clips, limited AI, Gmail/Outlook sync

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 30-hr meetings (100 participants), unlimited AI notes (My Notes), Zoom Mail/Calendar, 10GB cloud, unlimited clips

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: 300 participants, unlimited whiteboards & booking pages, SSO, device management, DLP APIs, multi-region storage

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1000 participants, full PBX, 500-attendee webinars, Rooms, Workspace Reservation, translated captions, hybrid cloud

pricing.notes: All prices shown are annual billing (save up to 16% vs monthly). Pro supports 1–99 licenses, Business 1–250, Enterprise 250+. Large Meeting add-on available on paid plans to increase participant caps. Monthly billing option exists but prices not shown in source.
